vocab.meaning: sức khỏe toàn diện (cả thể chất lẫn tinh thần)
vocab.example: I strive for holistic wellness by balancing rigorous physical training with mindfulness practices.
I monitor my activity levels closely to ensure I don't maintain a chronic caloric surplus, which can lead to weight gain.
Strength training is a key part of my routine because it helps boost my basal metabolic rate.

vocab.meaning: mật độ vi chất dinh dưỡng
vocab.example: I focus on the micronutrient density of my meals rather than just counting calories to ensure my body gets enough vitamins.

vocab.meaning: sự điều chỉnh tư thế (cột sống/vóc dáng)
vocab.example: Pilates has been instrumental in improving my postural alignment, especially since I spend hours sitting at a desk.
I avoid blue light exposure late at night to keep my circadian rhythm in sync for better sleep quality.
Engaging in lifelong learning and aerobic exercise is my way of protecting myself against future cognitive decline.

vocab.meaning: khả năng phục hồi của cơ thể (thể chất)
vocab.example: Cold showers and heat therapy like saunas are methods I use to build greater physiological resilience.
My philosophy for staying healthy is simple: moderation in all things, from the food I eat to the intensity of my workouts.

vocab.meaning: lối sống thụ động/ít vận động
vocab.example: I made a conscious effort to move more throughout the day to break the chains of a sedentary lifestyle.
